task_completion.description: Start a new tax return for David Miller
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the name 'David Miller' entered in the taxpayer identification, personal information, or wizard section of the tax software (StudioTax).

task_completion.description: Set the taxpayer's marital status to Divorced
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checked box, radio button, or dropdown selection indicating 'Divorced' in the marital status section of the personal information form.

task_completion.description: Enter child and spousal support payments
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for numerical entries related to 'Support payments made' (e.g., line 21999 or 22000) or a specific support payments worksheet/form being filled out.

task_completion.description: Enter legal fees for the divorce settlement
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for numerical entries for legal fees, typically found on line 23200 (Other deductions) or a specific legal fees deduction section/worksheet.

task_completion.description: Enter capital gains or losses from liquidated stocks
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for entries on Schedule 3 (Capital Gains/Losses) or T5008 forms showing the disposition of shares, stocks, or mutual funds.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return as 'david_miller.24t' in the StudioTax directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog or file explorer window showing the file 'david_miller.24t' being saved in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory, or the software title bar showing this filename.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the tax software GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the StudioTax application open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the .24t file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually navigated and entered data into the forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show various different screens or forms of the tax software (e.g., personal info, income, deductions) being actively filled out, not just a final save screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened and reviewed the source tax documents
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a PDF viewer, text editor, or image viewer open displaying the files from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\miller\' at some point during the trajectory.
